items.title: Margo Price Surprise Releases Protest Album Days of Unrest
items.summary: The July 4 weekend “mixtape” features a series of rallying covers, with a guest appearance from Joan Baez

items.title: Rico Nasty Introduces New Album RX With “Cupcake”
items.summary: A reunion with her longtime collaborator Kenny Beats, with contributions from 100 Gecs’ Dylan Brady

items.title: Djrum Prepping New EP I Wander
items.summary: A suite of six continuous tracks follows last year’s Under Tangled Silence
